summary: Theo (Assistant) reported an inability to visually process "merchants in a line before the gate.png" as it is an SVG/C2PA marker, not a standard visual image (JPEG/PNG). This prevents using it to lock down the "exact background" of the gate/wall or all visible merchants for the "hilarious comical distress dynamic action scene." Two paths forward were offered to the User (Director): either provide a new standard image (JPEG/PNG) of the city gate, wall, and full merchant line for precise architectural and crowd replication. Or, Theo can proceed by generating a generic desert city gate/wall and adding merchants in the style of `@image6` ("beduin merchant full size.png"), including an indigo-robed one. The Director must choose an approach to finalize the prompt.
